hero.name: Sapta
hero.description: Leveling up the digital landscape through creative engineering. Building robust web architectures with the precision of a gamer and the vision of a developer.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: Hi! I'm Sapta, a passionate student who loves building things for the web and the experiments. My journey in tech is fueled by a deep curiosity for how digital experiences work, but my inspiration is equally driven by a love for science, gaming, and the ever-evolving world of pop culture. When I'm not coding or exploring the latest things, I’m usually immersing myself in films, music, video games or the latest scientific discoveries, always looking for that perfect intersection where logic meets creativity to push my skills even further

items.title: SAGE — Smart Automated Grading Engine
items.desc: Thesis project: an automated essay scoring engine designed for consistent, rubric-aligned grading.

items.title: Underwater Oddysey
items.desc: Final team project: a Greenfoot game inspired by the quirks of a platypus, built with playful mechanics.

items.title: Designing Equality: Asa's Architectural Journey
items.desc: An animated short on gender equality, crafted through an architectural narrative.

items.title: Last Semester Student
items.desc: Building system for my Undergraduate Thesis. Focused on creating responsive, user friendly interfaces and seamless user experiences.

items.title: University Projects
items.desc: Developed multiple academic projects including web apps, database management systems, and collaborative tools.

items.title: Self-Learning Journey
items.desc: Started learning programming from scratch. Explored HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and built my first projects.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.desc: I'm currently open to new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — feel free to reach out!
